title: Dupatya gardneriana
taxonomy: Dupatya gardneriana is a species of flowering plant in the family Pentaphylacaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and is also known as the Yellow Gardenia. The species is classified within the genus Dupatya, which is a group of flowering plants. The classification of Dupatya gardneriana is further supported by its distinctive yellow flowers and leathery leaves. This plant is often used as an ornamental in gardens due to its unique and attractive appearance.
